Operation 'authenticate' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, not_actionable. Original summary is vague about what 'test' means. Description is completely missing. Added clarity about the operation's purpose (verification), what it requires (API key), what it returns (auth status and account info), and that it's a read-only operation. This helps AI agents understand when to use this for authentication validation.

data.description_suggestion: Verifies that the provided API key is valid and has active authentication. This operation tests connectivity and authentication credentials without performing any data operations. Returns authentication status and user/account information if successful. Requires valid API key in request header.
data.reasoning: Original summary is vague about what 'test' means. Description is completely missing. message: Operation 'createForm' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and actionable. Description is missing entirely. Added details about what inputs are expected (CreateFormRequest schema), what is returned (form object with formId), side effects (form becomes available for submissions), and authentication requirement. This enables AI agents to understand the complete operation lifecycle.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new form with the specified configuration. Accepts form details including name, fields, settings, and optional webhooks via CreateFormRequest schema. Returns the newly created form object with assigned formId and metadata. The form is immediately available for receiving submissions. Requires authentication via API key.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description is missing entirely. Added details about what inputs are expected (CreateFormRequest schema), what is returned (form object with formId), side effects (form becomes available for submissions), and authentication requirement. This enables AI agents to understand the complete operation lifecycle.

message: Operation 'deleteForm' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear. Description is missing. Added critical details about the formId parameter requirement, the irreversible nature of deletion, side effects (all submissions deleted), return value, and authentication requirement. This is essential for AI agents to understand the destructive nature of this operation and use it appropriately.

data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a form and all associated data. Requires the formId path parameter to identify which form to delete. This operation is irreversible - all form submissions and configuration data will be removed. Returns success confirmation. Requires authentication via API key.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear. Description is missing. Added critical details about the formId parameter requirement, the irreversible nature of deletion, side effects (all submissions deleted), return value, and authentication requirement. This is essential for AI agents to understand the destructive nature of this operation and use it appropriately.

Added details about pagination support, the formId requirement, mention of the 5 available query parameters for filtering/sorting/pagination, return schema (SubmissionsResponse), and authentication requirement. data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of submissions for a specific form. Requires formId path parameter to identify the form. Supports filtering and pagination via query parameters (5 parameters available for sorting, filtering, and pagination control). Returns SubmissionsResponse containing submission records with pagination metadata. Requires authentication via API key.
